entry.title: Submitted: Modeling Binary Relations in Piecewise-Linear Approximations
entry.summary: Together with Robert Burlacu, Tobias Kuen and Kristina Rolsing, we submitted our article Modeling Binary Relations in Piecewise-Linear Approximations. You can find our preprint on…
entry.content: Together with Robert Burlacu, Tobias Kuen and Kristina Rolsing, we submitted our article Modeling Binary Relations in Piecewise-Linear Approximations. You can find our preprint on Optimization Online.

entry.title: The PWL-T-Rex is online!
entry.summary: I just published my open source framework PWL-T-Rex on GitHub. Using this framework, you can reformulate MINLPs to MIP relaxations and approximations using different reformulation…
entry.content: I just published my open source framework PWL-T-Rex on GitHub. Using this framework, you can reformulate MINLPs to MIP relaxations and approximations using different reformulation techniques. Find more information on my GitHub or directly on this website: PWL-T-Rex
